r2.verdicts: all yes-with-fixes/clarifications/gaps; ~20 new issues + leftover drift
fixes_applied: RouteKey value-type introduced — fixes *int64 map-key pointer-identity bug
Per-route serial executor mandate — eliminates typing/edit_progress/STT/debounce race class
Stub, StateDir, ToolRegistry types declared in §4.5.1; Session is alias for Stub
AttachReq.Confirm carries the proposal echoed back — anti-race for sibling-stub mid-confirm topic creation
Schema example now includes fallback_cooldown_s, debounce_max_messages, stt_prefix, codex.shared_root, codex.app_server_meta_path; semantics documented
USAGE.md release path: c3-broker release subcommand from any shell, no need to /exit
USAGE.md reply-recovery: documented for both Claude and Codex (cross-CLI symmetry)
§6.1 notifications/claude/channel payload schema documented with full example, all-strings rule, omitted-vs-null convention
§6.2 STT plugin distribution: //go:embed handler.py + write-to-XDG_DATA on first run + sha256 update path; user-override sentinel; whisper Python package is system dependency (POC posture)
Corruption recovery on boot: log+exit, no silent skeleton fallback
inbox buffer policy: 100-msg ring, oldest dropped on overflow with log line, flushes on adapter disconnect
/c3-setup: validate Telegram token via getMe BEFORE writing mappings.json

notes: R2 fixes applied. Spec now ~1300 lines. R3 spawned to validate the cumulative fix passes; this is the final review round before the spec locks. If R3 returns clean (no critical structural issues), lock spec and start build phase 1.
